Airtime.php.title: Airtime Purchase Guide 📱
steps: Select your Network Provider (MTN, Airtel, etc.).
Enter the Phone Number or pick from favorites.
Input the Amount you want to buy.
Double-check the details and click 'Buy Now'.

Data.php.title: Data Subscription Guide 🌐
steps: Choose your Network and Data Plan.
Our AI checks for valid number formats automatically.

Utility.php.title: Bill Payment Guide ⚡
steps: Enter your Meter or Account Number.
Click 'Verify' to see the Account Name.
Once verified, proceed to pay securely.
